mapper.sql: SELECT bl.STD_USER_ID AS stdUserId, bl.BLKLST_STRT_DT AS blklstStrtDt, bl.BLKLST_END_DT AS blklstEndDt, TRIM(bl.BLKLST_LVL_CD) AS blklstLvlCd, TRIM(bl.BLKLST_CTGR_CD) AS blklstCtgrCd, bl.BLKLST_ACTN_CN AS blklstActnCn, bl.BLKLST_RSN_CN AS blklstRsnCn, m.USER_NAME AS userName, lc.COM_CD_NM AS blklstLvlNm, cc.COM_CD_NM AS blklstCtgrNm, cls.CLASS_NM AS classNm, CASE WHEN bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR bl.BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP THEN 'active' ELSE 'resolved' END AS status, h.REG_USER_ID AS regUserId, rm.USER_NAME AS regUserName, h.REG_DT AS regDt, NVL(h.LOG_CNT, 0) AS logCount FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST bl JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = bl.STD_USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD lc ON TRIM(lc.CL_CODE) = '700' AND TRIM(lc.COM_CD) = TRIM(bl.BLKLST_LVL_CD) LEFT JOIN COM_CD cc ON TRIM(cc.CL_CODE) = '701' AND TRIM(cc.COM_CD) = TRIM(bl.BLKLST_CTGR_CD) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cm.USER_ID, LISTAGG(cl.CLASS_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cl.CLASS_NM) AS CLASS_NM FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cl.CLASS_SN = cm.CLASS_SN WHERE cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = '01' GROUP BY cm.USER_ID ) cls ON cls.USER_ID = bl.STD_USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BLKLST_STD_USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS LOG_CNT, MIN(CASE WHEN BLKLST_EVT_CD = 'REG' THEN BLKLST_REG_DT END) AS REG_DT, MIN(CASE WHEN BLKLST_EVT_CD = 'REG' THEN BLKLST_RGTR_USER_ID END) AS REG_USER_ID FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST_HISTORY GROUP BY BLKLST_STD_USER_ID ) h ON h.BLKLST_STD_USER_ID = bl.STD_USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER rm ON rm.USER_ID = h.REG_USER_ID

if.test: detailCondition != null and detailCondition.keyword != null and detailCondition.keyword != ''

where.if: AND ( m.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{detailCondition.keyword} || '%' OR bl.BLKLST_RSN_CN LIKE '%' || #{detailCondition.keyword} || '%' )

if.test: detailCondition != null and detailCondition.level != null and detailCondition.level != ''
detailCondition != null and detailCondition.category != null and detailCondition.category != ''

where.if: AND (bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR bl.BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP)
AND bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NOT NULL AND bl.BLKLST_END_DT <= SYSTIMESTAMP

mapper.select:
ORDER BY
m.USER_NAME bl.BLKLST_LVL_CD bl.BLKLST_STRT_DT bl.BLKLST_STRT_DT
ASC DESC
NULLS LAST OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST bl JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = bl.STD_USER_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN (bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR bl.BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP) AND TRIM(bl.BLKLST_LVL_CD) = '01' THEN 1 END) AS HIGH_RISK_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN (bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR bl.BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP) AND TRIM(bl.BLKLST_LVL_CD) = '02' THEN 1 END) AS OBSERVE_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN bl.BLKLST_END_DT IS NOT NULL AND bl.BLKLST_END_DT <= SYSTIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS RESOLVED_CNT FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST bl

SELECT h.BLKLST_HIST_SN AS blklstHistSn, h.BLKLST_STD_USER_ID AS blklstStdUserId, h.BLKLST_REG_DT AS blklstRegDt, h.BLKLST_RSN_CN AS blklstRsnCn, h.BLKLST_IMPS_DAYS_CNT AS blklstImpsDaysCnt, h.BLKLST_RGTR_USER_ID AS blklstRgtrUserId, TRIM(h.BLKLST_EVT_CD) AS blklstEvtCd, rm.USER_NAME AS rgtrUserName FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST_HISTORY h LEFT JOIN MEMBER rm ON rm.USER_ID = h.BLKLST_RGTR_USER_ID WHERE h.BLKLST_STD_USER_ID = #{stdUserId} ORDER BY h.BLKLST_REG_DT DESC, h.BLKLST_HIST_SN DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{stdUserId}
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN #{blklstImpsDaysCnt} IS NULL OR #{blklstImpsDaysCnt} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE SYSTIMESTAMP + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#{blklstImpsDaysCnt}, 'DAY') END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_BLACK_LIST (STD_USER_ID, BLKLST_STRT_DT, BLKLST_END_DT, BLKLST_LVL_CD, BLKLST_CTGR_CD, BLKLST_ACTN_CN, BLKLST_RSN_CN) VALUES (#{stdUserId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, , #{blklstLvlCd}, #{blklstCtgrCd}, #{blklstActnCn}, #{blklstRsnCn})
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_BLACK_LIST SET BLKLST_STRT_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP, BLKLST_END_DT = , BLKLST_LVL_CD = #{blklstLvlCd}, BLKLST_CTGR_CD = #{blklstCtgrCd}, BLKLST_ACTN_CN = #{blklstActnCn}, BLKLST_RSN_CN = #{blklstRsnCn} WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{stdUserId}
UPDATE STUDENT_BLACK_LIST SET BLKLST_END_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{stdUserId} AND (BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRIM(BLKLST_LVL_CD) = '01' AND (BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP)
SELECT BLKLST_END_DT FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST WHERE STD_USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRIM(BLKLST_LVL_CD) = '01' AND (BLKLST_END_DT IS NULL OR BLKLST_END_DT > SYSTIMESTAMP)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST_HISTORY WHERE BLKLST_STD_USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRIM(BLKLST_EVT_CD) IN ('WARN', 'SUSP', 'PERM')
SELECT LISTAGG(cl.CLASS_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cl.CLASS_NM) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cl.CLASS_SN = cm.CLASS_SN WHERE cm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = '01'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_BLACK_LIST_HISTORY (BLKLST_STD_USER_ID, BLKLST_REG_DT, BLKLST_RSN_CN, BLKLST_IMPS_DAYS_CNT, BLKLST_RGTR_USER_ID, BLKLST_EVT_CD) VALUES (#{blklstStdUserId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{blklstRsnCn}, #{blklstImpsDaysCnt}, #{blklstRgtrUserId}, #{blklstEvtCd})
